subcodes.title: Words to the American friends, spoken on 1912-03-31
subcodes.first_line: They [the Azalis] tampered with the contents of the history of Haji Mirza Jani by removing some of its passages and inserting others. They sent it to the libraries of London and Paris
subcodes.first_line_orig: تاریخ حاجی میرزا جانی را کم و زیاد نموده کتابخانهٴ پاریس و لندن فرستادند
